title: gesneria angustior
intro: Gesneria angustior is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the 'narrow-leafed gesneria'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gesneria angustior include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Gesneria angustior typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
